prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/319-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Sort the rows of the active table by column A in ascending order (Organize sidebar > Sort > Sort entire table > Add a column > Column A > Ascending; or click the column A header dropdown > Sort Ascending). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers sort_data ~/Desktop/kinbench/319-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1" A1:Z100 A'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/319-sort-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
